extortion.description: Tim Davies are award-winning landscape design, construction & maintenance experts for residential and commercial spaces. Contact us for an obligation free chat. Tim Davies Landscaping (TDL) has been an award-winning style leader in the Western Australian landscaping industry for over 30 years. Our focus is listening to you, our client and working with you to create an individual and unique garden. Our services include landscape design, construction, commercial landscaping maintenance and residential maintenance. Whether your project is residential or commercial, our passion is turning your vision into reality and creating "a garden for life" timdavieslandscaping.com.au
